title: Unable to grant object privileges while having a non-default current_role
key_bug_features: Granting privileges with non-default current_role fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE departments (dept_id bigint PRIMARY KEY, dept_name varchar(50) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE employees (id bigint PRIMARY KEY, name varchar(20), dept_id bigint, FOREIGN KEY (dept_id) REFERENCES departments(dept_id));
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, dept_id) VALUES (1, 'Clark', 1);
GRANT SELECT ON employees TO clark;
